summary: StudyBuddy LMS bug fixes verified - Both backend and frontend testing passed. 1) 'Save Draft' button removed from StructuredTestCreator - only single 'Save & Publish' button exists. 2) Published AI tests list in teacher's Create Test tab working correctly showing test titles, Published/Draft status badges, question count, marks, duration, deadline. 3) Draft tests NOT visible to students, only published tests appear.
seed_data_creation: Created test data via pytest: TEST_AdminTest_*, TEST_DraftOnly_*, TEST_EmptyTest_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: All structured test features working. Teacher login (T001) works - navigate to Teacher tab > Standard 5 > Mathematics > Create Test tab to see AI test features. TeacherAITestsList shows both Draft and Published tests. Students only see Published (active) tests. Single 'Save & Publish' button in StructuredTestCreator has data-testid='stc-publish-btn'.

backend_tests.test_create_test_as_admin: PASSED - Admin can create test, status=draft
backend_tests.test_draft_test_not_visible_to_student: PASSED - Student list excludes draft tests
backend_tests.test_published_test_visible_to_student: PASSED - Published tests visible to students
backend_tests.test_teacher_sees_all_tests: PASSED - Admin sees both draft and active

student_sees_only_published_tests.description: Student S001 logs in, clicks Mathematics, sees only active/published AI tests
findings: No Draft badges visible to students
Tests show: AI badge, title, questions, marks, duration, deadline

teacher_sees_published_ai_tests_list.description: Teacher view shows 'PUBLISHED AI-EVALUATED TESTS' section with both draft and published tests
findings: TeacherAITestsList shows both Draft (yellow badge) and Published (green badge) tests
Each test shows: AI badge, title, status badge, question count, marks, duration, deadline

single_save_publish_button.description: StructuredTestCreator has only ONE 'Save & Publish' button, no 'Save Draft'
findings: Only 1 action button in stc-actions div
No 'Save Draft' text found in page
